ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the race took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the race in kilometers */,
  "profile_score" REAL /* Profile score indicating the difficulty of the race */,
  "start_city" TEXT /* City where the race starts */,
  "end_city" TEXT /* City where the race ends */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Total elevation gain of the race in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "riders" (
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the rider */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the rider */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the rider belongs to */,
  "uci_rank" INTEGER /* UCI rank of the rider */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the rider in kilograms */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the rider in centimeters */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the rider (e.g., climber, sprinter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_riders_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "team_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team */,
  "title_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the team's title sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race the stage belongs to */,
  "stage_number" INTEGER /* Stage number in the context of the race */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the stage in kilometers */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the stage */,
  "avg_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the winner in km/h */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Type of terrain in the stage (e.g., flat, hilly, mountainous) */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Total elevation gain of the stage in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_stages_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stage the result corresponds to */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rider who achieved the result */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the rider in the stage */,
  "timelag" TEXT /* Time lag behind the stage winner */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the rider for the stage */,
  "bonus_seconds" INTEGER /* Bonus seconds awarded to the rider for the stage */,
  "penalty_seconds" INTEGER /* Penalty seconds applied to the rider for the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES race_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile type */,
  "profile_score" REAL /* Score indicating the difficulty of the profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the profile's characteristics */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Type of terrain in the profile (e.g., flat, hilly, mountainous) */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Total elevation gain of the profile in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stage the weather data corresponds to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES race_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rider being analyzed */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the rider over multiple races */,
  "avg_finish_time" TEXT /* Average finish time of the rider over multiple races */,
  "average_power" REAL /* Average power output of the rider over multiple races */,
  "average_heart_rate" REAL /* Average heart rate of the rider over multiple races */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the user has */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_exported" INTEGER /* Whether data was exported during the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Road, Mountain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., UCI WorldTour, UCI ProSeries) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_category_map" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES race_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_category_map_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rider_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rider */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the progress corresponds to */,
  "performance_improvement" REAL /* Performance improvement of the rider over the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rider_progress_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rider_progress_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_reviews_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rider who sustained the injury */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race where the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., crash, illness) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)
